## What and why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] feat (new capability)
- [ ] fix (bug fix)
- [ ] refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] docs
- [ ] test
- [ ] chore / perf / style

## Checks

- [ ] `npm run check` passes locally (lint, typecheck, build, Rust tests)
- [ ] Commits follow the Conventional Commit rules in `CLAUDE.md`
- [ ] I respected the product/architecture guardrails in `CLAUDE.md`
      (never require git, keep the domain layer independent of the terminal
      renderer, local-first only, dangerous/YOLO stays explicit)
